title: senna artemisioides subsp. filifolia
intro: Senna artemisioides subsp. filifolia, also known as the spreading senna, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Senna artemisioides subsp. filifolia include its high content of anthraquinones, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, relieve constipation, and help with weight loss due to its purgative properties. Senna artemisioides subsp. filifolia is commonly prepared as a tea or capsule by herbalists, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
